description: This class includes all post-harvest activities aimed at upgrading seed quality through the removal of non-seed material, undersized, mechanically or insect-damaged and immature seeds, as well as removal of seed moisture to a safe level for seed storage.
includes: drying, cleaning, grading and treating of seeds until they are marketed
activities including those concerned with genetically modified seeds
excludes: growing of seeds, see divisions 01.1 and 01.2
processing of seeds for oil extraction, see 1040
research aimed at developing or modifying new forms of seeds, see 7210
